Character consistency

Reuse the same character across new scenes

Save a generated image as a character reference, then prompt that character into new settings, actions, and creative directions.

Create a characterSee character limits

Creator workflows

How creators use saved characters

Original characters

Create a protagonist, mascot, avatar, or campaign character and keep the look recognizable.

Scene variations

Move the character from a studio to a city, a fantasy location, or a product moment.

Storyboards

Keep visual continuity across multiple frames before production or illustration work begins.

Client approvals

Show the same character in several contexts so stakeholders can compare directions quickly.

Start free

Start with one saved character

Free accounts can save one character, which is enough to test character consistency before moving to a paid plan with more capacity.
